mapper.sql: pm.message_id, pm.conversation_id, pm.sender_id, pm.receiver_id, u.nickname AS sender_nickname, u.avatar AS sender_avatar, pm.message_type, CASE pm.message_type WHEN 1 THEN '文本消息' WHEN 2 THEN '图片消息' WHEN 3 THEN '文件消息' ELSE '未知类型' END AS message_type_desc, pm.content, pm.file_url, pm.file_name, pm.file_size, pm.is_recalled, pm.recalled_at, pm.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM private_message pm LEFT JOIN user u ON pm.sender_id = u.user_id WHERE pm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND pm.is_recalled = 0 ORDER BY pm.create_time ASC
SELECT FROM private_message pm LEFT JOIN user u ON pm.sender_id = u.user_id WHERE pm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND pm.is_recalled = 0 ORDER BY pm.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.conversation_id FROM ( SELECT conversation_id, create_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id ORDER BY create_time DESC) AS rn FROM private_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}) AND is_recalled = 0 ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM private_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND is_recalled = 0
